scripts.postinstall: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); const cmd = process.platform === 'win32' ? 'npx.cmd' : 'npx'; const env = { ...process.env, PUPPETEER_CACHE_DIR: './.cache/puppeteer' }; const result = spawnSync(cmd, ['puppeteer', 'browsers', 'install', 'chrome'], { stdio: 'inherit', env }); process.exit(result.status ?? 0);"
scripts.verify:chrome: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p=require('puppeteer'); const ep=typeof p.executablePath==='function'?p.executablePath():''; console.log('PUPPETEER_EXECUTABLE_PATH=',process.env.PUPPETEER_EXECUTABLE_PATH||''); console.log('puppeteer.executablePath()=',ep); console.log('exists=',ep?fs.existsSync(ep):false);"
